name: asset-factory-root
description: URAI Asset Factory orchestration and production image forge

scripts.test: npm --prefix engine test && npm --prefix life-map-pipeline/functions test && npm --prefix functions test
scripts.build: npm --prefix life-map-pipeline/functions run build && npm --prefix functions run build
scripts.verify:local: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@9.15.9 --activate && npm run image:install && npm run build && npm test --if-present && npm run test:launch-readiness --if-present && npm run test:completion-lock --if-present && npm run image:check:version-contract && npm run image:check
scripts.verify:production: npm run verify:local && npm run deploy:verify
scripts.test:launch-readiness: npm run test:studio-deploy-readiness && npm run test:hs256-production-readiness && npm run test:privacy-safety-readiness && npm run test:support-smoke-readiness && npm run test:route-guards && npm run check:paid-workflow-boundary && npm run check:smoke-readonly-boundary
scripts.finite-time:proof: npm run finite-time:animatic && npm run finite-time:validate && npm run finite-time:storyboard-v2 && npm run finite-time:validate-v2 && npm run finite-time:validate-authorization
scripts.image:wheel: npm run image:manifest && npm run image:generate && npm run image:validate && npm run image:score && npm run image:preview && npm run image:seed && npm run image:export && npm run image:handoff:spatial
scripts.audit:root: test -f package-lock.json && npm audit --audit-level=high || echo 'Skipping root audit: package-lock.json is not committed yet. Run npm install --package-lock-only to enable root audit.'
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:root && npm run audit:functions
scripts.deploy:studio: npm --prefix assetfactory-studio run check && cd assetfactory-studio && firebase deploy --project urai-4dc1d --only hosting
scripts.deploy:production: npm run verify:local && npm run deploy:studio && npm run deploy:verify
scripts.deploy:partial: npm run verify:local && npm run deploy:hosting-rules && npm run deploy:verify-readonly
